introSection:
Kansas Twister is a steel twin shuttle roller coaster currently located at Warner Bros. Movie World in Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia. The ride was built by Vekoma and is a clone of Tweestryd.

Riders first enter the gates of the Emerald City. Inside is the head of the Wizard of Oz, and the ride entrances for Kansas Twister and Flight of the Wicked Witch. The queueline is set inside Dorothy's house during the tornado; the floor is on a slight incline. The queue continues into the barnhouse, which is the station building. Riders then board either the yellow or orange trains and begin the ride.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The name of the ride was announced in February 2024.

The ride opened on 20 December 2024.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Ride page on the park's website

fullText:
Kansas Twister is a steel twin shuttle roller coaster currently located at Warner Bros. Movie World in Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia. The ride was built by Vekoma and is a clone of Tweestryd.

Riders first enter the gates of the Emerald City. Inside is the head of the Wizard of Oz, and the ride entrances for Kansas Twister and Flight of the Wicked Witch. The queueline is set inside Dorothy's house during the tornado; the floor is on a slight incline. The queue continues into the barnhouse, which is the station building. Riders then board either the yellow or orange trains and begin the ride.

The name of the ride was announced in February 2024.

The ride opened on 20 December 2024.
